---
title: "Islander"
author:
  - "Trần Việt Hà"
  - "Nguyễn Đình Mai Vi"
  - "Vũ Hà Thư"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d/%m/%Y')`"

output:

  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged

fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=2.5cm
mainfont: "Times New Roman"


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Render Unicode (Vietnamese) text in plots correctly.
# The default pdf() device cannot draw Vietnamese diacritics, and cairo_pdf
# is unavailable here (needs XQuartz). showtext draws text as glyphs from a
# system font file, so it works on the default device with full Unicode.
library(showtext)
times_path <- "/System/Library/Fonts/Times.ttc"
if (file.exists(times_path)) sysfonts::font_add("Times", regular = times_path)
showtext_auto()

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.showtext = TRUE
)
```

```{=latex}
\begin{titlepage}
\thispagestyle{empty}

\begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture, overlay]
  \draw[line width=2pt, blue!80!black]
    ([xshift=0.9cm, yshift=-0.9cm]current page.north west)
    rectangle
    ([xshift=-0.9cm, yshift=0.9cm]current page.south east);
  \draw[line width=0.5pt, blue!80!black]
    ([xshift=1.1cm, yshift=-1.1cm]current page.north west)
    rectangle
    ([xshift=-1.1cm, yshift=1.1cm]current page.south east);
\end{tikzpicture}

\begin{center}

\vspace*{0.8cm}
{\LARGE\bfseries TRƯỜNG ĐẠI HỌC KHOA HỌC TỰ NHIÊN}\\[0.3em]
{\LARGE\bfseries KHOA TOÁN -- TIN HỌC}

\vspace{1.5cm}

\includegraphics[width=4cm]{logo.png}

\vspace{1.5cm}

{\Large\bfseries BÁO CÁO}\\[0.5em]
{\LARGE\bfseries MÔ HÌNH HÓA THỐNG KÊ}\\[0.7em]
\rule{0.6\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[0.6em]
{\large Đề tài 4: \textbf{Islander}}

\vspace{1.5cm}

{\large Giảng viên hướng dẫn: \textbf{TS. Nguyễn Thị Mộng Ngọc}}

\vspace{1.5cm}

{\large\bfseries Nhóm 8}

\vspace{0.6em}
{\small
\begin{tabular}{|l|c|p{5.5cm}|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Họ và Tên} & \textbf{Mã số HV} & \textbf{Công việc} & \textbf{Mức độ hoàn thành} \\
\hline
Trần Việt Hà       & 25C23020 & & 100\% \\
\hline
Nguyễn Đình Mai Vi & 25C23005 &                 & 100\% \\
\hline
Vũ Hà Thư          & 25C23004 &        & 100\% \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
}

\vfill

{\large TP. Hồ Chí Minh, 2026}

\vspace{0.8cm}
\end{center}
\end{titlepage}

\tableofcontents
\newpage
```


```{r child="parts/DatVanDe.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/DuLieuVaThietLap.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/TieuChuanLuaChonBien.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/PhuongPhapLuaChonMoHinh&KiemChungCheo.Rmd"}
```


```{r child="parts/LuaChonMoHinhVaBoostrap.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/KiemChungCheo.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/Tailieuthamkhao.Rmd"}
```
